reviews.review_msg: Not even done the term but easily the best prof I've had. Everything is straightforward and easy to understand. Grading is fair-easy and all the criteria are thorough. Assignments are simple, so are pop quizzes. Dr. Zhang is very kind, explains clearly, and is accessible outside class. No midterms or lectures. I've gotten 100% on everything so far.

Prof. Zhang is amazing! They're one of the only profs at SFU where i actually look forward to lecture and enjoy doing the assignments/readings. She really wants her students to succeed and is super accommodating if you need extra help or guidance. Great prof all around.

Erique is by far my favourite prof at SFU. I've taken a couple courses with them and never been disappointed. They are so kind and make the topics actually interesting and applicable to modern day media and culture. Overall an amazing professor.
